headline: Repurchases of shares by EQT AB during week 12, 2026
summary: Between 16 March 2026 and 20 March 2026 EQT AB (LEI code 213800U7P9GOIRKCTB34) ("EQT") has repurchased in total 346,952 own ordinary shares (ISIN: SE0012853455).

headline: Asia wants more U.S. oil and gas to reduce Middle East dependence after Iran war, Burgum says
summary: Japan, South Korea and Taiwan rely heavily on exports through the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Natural Gas ETFs to Watch as Energy Crisis Deepens Amid Iran War
summary: Natural gas prices surge amid Middle East conflict, pushing ETFs like UNG into focus as supply disruptions fuel a global energy crunch.

headline: Is EQT Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: EQT has delivered stronger returns than the Nasdaq Composite recently, and analysts are strongly upbeat about its future prospects.

headline: EQT Real Estate acquires 2 million square foot infill logistics portfolio in Southern New Jersey
summary: EQT Real Estate is pleased to announce that the EQT Real Estate Logistics Value Fund VI ("EQT Real Estate") has acquired a portfolio comprising nine buildings totaling approximately 2 million square feet in Southern New Jersey.

raw.headline: EQT Real Estate acquires 2 million square foot infill logistics portfolio in Southern New Jersey
raw.summary: EQT Real Estate is pleased to announce that the EQT Real Estate Logistics Value Fund VI ("EQT Real Estate") has acquired a portfolio comprising nine buildings totaling approximately 2 million square feet in Southern New Jersey.

headline: EQT AB publishes Annual & Sustainability Report for 2025
summary: EQT AB (publ) has today published its Annual and Sustainability Report ("the Report") for 2025. The Report is available at www.eqtgroup.com/shareholders. The Report explores EQT's journey over the three decades since its founding, focused on the past six years as a listed company, and highlights EQT's long-term growth strategy.
